ground_truth.title: Sparks, NV Homes For Sale & Real Estate | RE/MAX
ground_truth.main_content: Real estate listings for homes in Sparks, NV. The page shows 453 homes for sale with various properties including: 7194 Lemur Landing Way # Homesite ($740,950, 4 Beds, 4 Baths, 2,675 Sq Ft, New Listing), 6875 Pah Rah Dr ($508,000, 3 Beds, 3 Baths, 1,958 Sq Ft, Open House, 3D Virtual Tour), 7037 Mount Nimba St # Homesite ($551,133, 3 Beds, 3 Baths, 2,090 Sq Ft, New Listing), 765 Bobcat Ridge Rd # Homesite ($638,753, 4 Beds, 3 Baths, 2,714 Sq Ft, New Listing), 1712 Eagle Landing Dr # Homesite ($630,454, 4 Beds, 3 Baths, 2,714 Sq Ft, New Listing), 3486 Mashie Dr ($439,900, 3 Beds, 3 Baths, 1,422 Sq Ft, New Listing), 343 Richards Way ($409,900, 3 Beds, 1 Bath, 1,044 Sq Ft, New Listing), 1250 Oxford Ave ($485,000, 4 Beds, 2 Baths, 1,428 Sq Ft, Open House, Virtual Tour), 997 Ephedra Ln ($424,900, 2 Beds, 2 Baths, 1,096 Sq Ft, New Listing), 25 El Caballo Trl ($1,000,000, 3 Beds, 2 Baths, 1,964 Sq Ft, New Listing), and many more properties with prices ranging from $269,900 to $1,000,000. Listings include various features and badges such as New Listing, Open House, Virtual Tour, and 3D Virtual Tour.
